changes_made: Removed verbose explanations and generic patterns that overwhelmed the small model
Added explicit instruction: 'Do NOT run pip install' - model was stuck in infinite pip install loop
Added clear 4-step workflow: read CSV, write Python script, execute it, verify output
Replaced generic code snippets with two complete, ready-to-run Python scripts for each task type (ANOVA and regression)
Scripts include all required output fields matching the exact JSON schema expected by tests
Reduced skill from ~200 lines of reference material to ~120 lines of actionable, copy-paste-ready code
